Patch Set 8: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

Peng Tao, It seem your patch is triggering an error in sanityn.  Test 16 is an FSX test that is failing.  It seems in the last little while you have hit it 3 times? 

I don't see this sanityn test 16 error anywhere else in maloo in over the last 4 weeks.

 See https://maloo.whamcloud.com/sub_tests/04295b16-c116-11e2-8769-52540035b04c and look at the test_log for the latest failure.  FSX uses truncate pretty freely.

Patch Set 8: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

parents.subject: LU-3318 llite: Always build 64bit ino internally

commit.subject: LU-2850 kernel: 3.8 upstream removes vmtruncate()
commit.message:
LU-2850 kernel: 3.8 upstream removes vmtruncate()

vmtruncate() is removed since upstream commit b9f61c3.
Also truncate_setsize is not always available. So we
just open code it and use truncate_pagecache instead.

Signed-off-by: Peng Tao <tao.peng@emc.com>
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@gmail.com>
Change-Id: I9d4f43a5c181f16482b4caa021ba7a09ee52b600
